title: Connected board as an item name
excerpt:
It would be great if the ‘item’ column could be a connected board.

posts.author: samuelcruickshank (Samuel Cruickshank)
posts.cookedHtml:
It would be great if the ‘item’ column could be a connected board.

To give context, we have Events, which have People in their RSVP list. When I add an item to the Events Board, I want a RSVP board to be created, where every row is a Person with an RSVP status column
